fixed_values.parent_feature: system-dev-plannerの1 runが計画するfeatureのgraph_node_id。全promoted taskが共有。値は起動時にfeature文脈から解決する

field_mapping.graph_node_id: SYS task id 由来規則: published typed task spec frontmatter id (SYS-<workstream_kind>-<NNN>) から tasks/<id> として決定論導出 (idempotency_key の第一要素)
field_mapping.title: published typed task spec frontmatter title
field_mapping.project_id: SYS task id 由来規則: published plan の target slug (SYS task id を発行した plan 識別子) から導出
field_mapping.domain: workstream_kind → domain 写像 (frontend/backend/api/data/infrastructure/security/quality/documentation/operations の 9 値をそのまま採用)
field_mapping.priority/start_date/target_date/iteratio: typed task specの任意値を写像し、未指定はnull。Projectsへ投影する場合もローカルnodeが正本
field_mapping.owners: published typed task spec frontmatter owners
field_mapping.tags: published typed task spec frontmatter tags
field_mapping.depends_on: published typed task spec frontmatter depends_on を graph_node_id 形式へ変換
field_mapping.related_nodes: published typed task spec frontmatter related_nodes (無ければ空 array)
field_mapping.resource_scope: write_scope → resource_scope 写像 (published typed task spec frontmatter write_scope)
field_mapping.parent_feature: fixed_values.parent_feature由来。system-dev-plannerの起動元featureのgraph_node_id (自動起動はdev-graph feature文脈、手動起動は解決済みfeature参照)を1 run内の全promoted taskへ一律付与する。dev-graph側の実在feature参照解決とparent_feature整合検査はdev-graphが担う
field_mapping.feature_package_id: workstream-inventory top-levelと各taskで共通のfeature_package_idを写像する
field_mapping.phase_ref: P01..P13 exact-setを1 taskずつ写像する。欠落・重複・順序driftは登録前に拒否する
field_mapping.file_path: published tasks root 相対の task spec path (path_policy 準拠)
field_mapping.source_lineage: origin_kind=system-dev-planner, source_plugin=system-dev-planner, source_path=published task spec repo-relative path, source_version=plugin manifest version, source_digest=registration source_digest without sha256 prefix, imported_at=atomic-promotion-receipt.promoted_at
field_mapping.github_publication: typed task specのGitHub publication intentを写像。tracker_binding=beads|noneではmode=local_onlyを強制し、tracker_binding=githubではissue|issue_and_projectsを必須とする。GitHub bindingのlocal_onlyは未管理taskを生むためfail-closed
field_mapping.tracker_binding: payload nodeはfixed sentinel repo-config-defaultを持ち、同じpayloadのbinding_intents[graph_node_id]へtyped task specのtracker_binding_intentを写像する。C02がtransaction内で解決し、sentinelは永続化しない
field_mapping.beads_linkage: fixed_values.beads_linkage=null。issue_linkageと対称にbd起票後にdev-graph側が更新する
field_mapping.pull_request_linkages: fixed_values.pull_request_linkages=[]。実装PR作成/照合後にdev-graph側が更新する
field_mapping.execution_contexts: fixed_values.execution_contexts=[]。worktree claim/merge事実をdev-graph側がdefault branchへ収束投影する
field_mapping.completion_evidence: workstream-inventory task.pr_completion_policyを写像し、未指定時だけlinked_pr_merged_all。status=in_progress,source/completed_at/reconciled_at=null,evidence_refs=[]で初期化しdev-graph C26が更新する
field_mapping.branch_policy: workstream-inventory task.branch_policyはone-task-one-branch/lease/default reconciliation/assignment_owner=dev-graph-schedulerだけを宣言する。具体suggested_branchは登録後にC15がgraph_node_idから一意導出しC27へ渡す (graph-node propertyではなくdev-graph schedulerへの宣言引き渡し)
field_mapping.implementation_readiness: C08 structured readiness reportのstatus/missing_sections/checked_at (statusはcomplete固定、missing_sections=[])
field_mapping.acceptance/verification: remain task Markdown sections and are not extra graph-node properties

receipt.success_condition: status=registered and expected_count=applied_count=13 and registered_node_ids exact-set equals P01..P13 manifest task ids and one parent_feature/package identity
receipt.failure_condition: status=aborted and applied_count=0; partial success is forbidden

path_policy: file_path is relative to caller repository root and must resolve inside configured tasks root
idempotency_key: per node graph_node_id+source_lineage.source_digest; batch promotion digest is provenance and replay boundary, not a substitute for per-node digest
